entry.title: TwoMillion
entry.content:
TwoMillion

https://app.hackthebox.com/machines/TwoMillion

![[TwoMillion.png]]

nmap

發現開放端口22(ssh)及80(http)

![[Pasted image 20240603030036.png]]

網站

![[Pasted image 20240603030613.png]]

域名解析

![[Pasted image 20240603031516.png]]

發現join頁面

![[Pasted image 20240603031717.png]]

點擊join進入invite code頁面

![[Pasted image 20240603032021.png]]

entry.title: getting started
entry.content:
ssh

ssh-keygen

save id_rsa.pub to ~/.ssh

ssh -i ~/.ssh/custom_key_name SYSUSER@IP_ADDRESS_OF_SERVER

netcat

https://linux.die.net/man/1/nc

windows
https://nmap.org/download.html

powercat

https://github.com/besimorhino/powercat

socat

https://linux.die.net/man/1/socat

https://github.com/andrew-d/static-binaries

tty

https://blog.ropnop.com/upgrading-simple-shells-to-fully-interactive-ttys/#method-2-using-socat

tmux

prefix [CTRL + B]

open a new window
prefix + c

switch windows
prefix + number_of_the_windows

split a window vertically
prefix + %

switch between panes
prefix + left, right, up, down

cheat sheet
https://tmuxcheatsheet.com/

vim

normal mode

|x|Cut character|
|dw|Cut word|
|dd|Cut full line|
|yw|Copy word|
|yy|Copy full line|
|p|Paste|

Tip: We can multiply any command to run multiple times by adding a number before it. For example, ‘4yw’ would copy 4 words instead of one, and so on.

:1Go to line number 1.
:wWrite the file, save
:qQuit
:q!Quit without saving
:wqWrite and quit

cheat sheet
https://vimsheet.com/
